ats_utilities.splash.ats_splash module¶

Module

ats_splash.py

Info

Defines class Splash with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads a splash screen info and adds hyperlinks.

class ats_utilities.splash.ats_splash.Splash(prop: Dict[Any, Any], splash_property: ISplashProperty | None = None, terminal_property: ITerminalProperties | None = None, github: IExtInfrastructure | None = None, ext: IExtInfrastructure | None = None, pb: IProgressBar | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: ISplash

Defines class Splash with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads a splash screen info and adds hyperlinks. API splash component.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for outputting messages.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__splash_property - Splash property checker.
__terminal_property - Terminal properties.
__github - GitHub infrastructure for hyperlinks (used if ‘ats_use_github_infrastructure’ is True).
__ext - Generic external infrastructure for hyperlinks (used if ‘ats_use_github_infrastructure’ is False).
__pb - Progress bar.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Splash constructor.
center - Center console line.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
center(columns: int, additional_shifter: int, text: str | None, verbose: bool = False) → None[source]¶

Center console line.

Parameters:

  • columns (<int>) – Colums for console session

  • additional_shifter (<int>) – Additional shifters

  • text (<Optional[str]>) – Text for console session | None

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Exceptions:

ATSTypeError | ATSValueError
